message:
Command `
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Step 72 directory ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/"

echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane FD list ==="
LIBPID=1250738
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== librelane_drt3.log ==="
wc -c /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null
tail -20 /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | tail -10
` executed with exit code 0.
